attributes.action: Hold a referendum on English independence from the UK
attributes.additional_details: Scotland has had an independence referendum. The English haven't. Wales and Northern Ireland have had devolution referendums. It's time England had an independence referendum.
attributes.background: Scotland has had an independence referendum. The English haven't. Wales and Northern Ireland have had devolution referendums. It's time England had an independence referendum.

rejection.details: You may wish to sign this petition which calls for a similar action: https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/769555
